title: Lethal Company Textures + Music
description: A resource pack that adds things from lethal company.
body:
A Resource pack that adds creatures from lethal company, including

The Braken

The Manticoil

The Snare Flea

The Jester

The Mimic

 Hygrodere

The Bunker Spider

Plus al of the Boom Box music!
and some blocks from the game
